generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for real-time point cloud acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudsTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for stereo vision data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring ego vehicle velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring front wheel orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting speed commands to motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle directional control"
]

instance ObjectTrackingProcessor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component processing sensor data for object tracking using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTracksTransmitted
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Premium1_10ScaleVehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle platform for autonomy testing"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for real-time processing"
]

instance OrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for edge computing tasks"
]

instance UserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface device for real-time visualization and remote control"
]

instance LidarPointCloudsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackingProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkForPointCloudProcessing
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo depth camera data for 3D scene reconstruction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkForPointCloudProcessing
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Front wheel steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions and trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering in autonomous driving"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkForPointCloudProcessing
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking stability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model compliant with ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for embedded AI development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for distributed system communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService, ObjectTracksAndDrivingPathVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for high-performance computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance MATLABSimulinkForPointCloudProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing pipelines"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTracksAndDrivingPathVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables SQLDataStorageService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state monitoring with UI display and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on digital twin for computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStatusInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCRemoteControlAction
]

instance ObjectTracksAndDrivingPathVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation for vehicle performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance SQLDataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SQL-based data storage for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageStatusInsight
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transparent display of vehicle speed and steering state for driver trust"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization for decision-making transparency"
]

instance ACCStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system status and operational insights from digital twin"
]

instance ACCRemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control command for ACC system in digital twin environment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated performance reports for vehicle operation analysis"
]

instance DataStorageStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and health of SQL database storage operations"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin environment containing vehicle hardware components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator, ObjectTrackingProcessor, TraxxasSlash4x4Premium1_10ScaleVehicle, JetsonNX, OrinNano
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin environment for cloud-based computation and visualization"
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlModel, ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabaseEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, ObjectTracksAndDrivingPathVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService, RemoteManagementService, SQLDataStorageService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing environment for visualization and remote interaction"
    base:contains UserInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC control commands (desired speed), emergency braking commands, and enable/disable commands for ACC sent from the Digital Twin Entity to the vehicle's motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture comprising Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data storage), User Entity (3D visualization and control panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), with ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity data exchange."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (development and validation of ACC system) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring during vehicle operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 standards; latency and clock sync requirements follow 3GPP 22.185; no explicit verification/validation methods beyond standards compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson devices; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data storage) hosted on cloud/server; User Entity on separate device (PC or cloud)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, and 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include adherence to 100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time emergency braking; cybersecurity aspects not detailed in the document."
]
